2606.30015.title: Parametric Skills
2606.30015.paper_summary: Since intelligence fundamentally relies on efficient skill acquisition (Chollet, 2019), the ability to leverage skills is critical. For LLMs, skills, manually authored or extracted from task trajectories, are textual recipes encoding mature problem-solving experience and are critical to agentic capabilities. Despite widespread deployment, their utility is limited by the model's ability to comprehend and follow skill instructions, especially under complex and long-context scenarios, where key instructions are difficult to locate and adhere to. To address this limitation, we propose ParametricSkills, a framework that can convert free-form textual skills into parameters at test time, enabling context-free skill exploitation. Specifically, we first construct a large-scale, high-quality skill library, and synthesize single-turn and multi-turn skill exploitation trajectories built around these skills with OpenCode. Using these data, we then train a hypernetwork that parameterizes both the skill content and the test-time exploitation methodology by receiving textual skills and converting them into LoRA adapters. Experimental results on six complex software engineering (SWE) subtasks demonstrate that, the proposed ParametricSkills averagely outperforms in-context learning by 6.44 points as judged by DeepSeek-V4-Flash, while also achieving significantly higher BERT Score and F1 score, confirming its effectiveness. Beyond performance, we further find that parametric skills, being inherently accumulative, offer a preliminary yet promising avenue toward test-time continual learning.
2606.30015.paper_summary_zh: 由於智慧基本上依賴於有效的技能獲取 (Chollet, 2019)，因此利用技能的能力至關重要。對於 LLMs 來說，技能無論是手動編寫還是從任務軌跡中提取，都是編碼成熟問題解決經驗的文本配方，對於代理能力至關重要。儘管廣泛部署，但它們的效用受到模型理解和遵循技能指令能力的限制，特別是在複雜和長上下文場景中，關鍵指令難以定位和遵循。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了 ParametricSkills，一個可以在測試時將自由形式的文本技能轉換為參數的框架，從而實現無上下文的技能利用。具體來說，我們首先構建了一個大規模、高質量的技能庫，並使用 OpenCode 合成圍繞這些技能的單回合和多回合技能利用軌跡。利用這些數據，我們訓練了一個超網絡，該網絡通過接收文本技能並將其轉換為 LoRA 適配器，來參數化技能內容和測試時的利用方法。在六個複雜的軟體工程 (SWE) 子任務上的實驗結果顯示，所提出的 ParametricSkills 在 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 的評判下，平均超越上下文學習 6.44 分，同時也實現了顯著更高的 BERT 分數和 F1 分數，確認了其有效性。除了性能之外，我們進一步發現，參數化技能本質上是累積的，為測試時的持續學習提供了一條初步但有前景的途徑。
2606.30015.author: Xuan Zhao et.al.
2606.30015.authors: Xuan Zhao, Haonan He, Qingyu Yang, Minglei Li, Jingqi Ye, Zelin Tan, Bo Wan, Peng Ye
